_meta.source: Figma — Dev Master File › Email Templates (node 7539:2963)
_meta.note: Hand-edited only to add the documented token gaps below. Re-pull from Figma if variables change. Keep this file as the single source of truth for the MJML build and the Python sender.

bg._gap: navyDeep/navy/card are NOT yet Figma variables — the design uses an image+gradient background. Approximated from the screenshot. Replace with real Bg/* tokens when design adds them (see README 'Token gaps').

font._titleNote: Heading title (`Your Voice Echo`) renders ~44px on desktop in Figma; no variable exists. Scales down on mobile via mj-breakpoint.

radius._outlook: Outlook ignores radius — square fallback is expected.

links._note: All resolved at send-time by the Python sender from env + per-echo data. Listed here so the MJML placeholders and the sender agree on names.

assets._note: Absolute https CDN URLs, injected at render. No base64/embedded images (size + client support).
